query: SELECT p.id as pdi_id, p.colaboradorId, u.name as colaborador_nome, u.id as user_id FROM pdis p JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id WHERE u.role = 'colaborador' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT p.id as pdi_id, p.colaboradorId, u.name as colaborador_nome, u.id as user_id FROM pdis p JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id WHERE u.role = 'colaborador' LIMIT 1;
